title: Senior Doctor - Piramal Pharma Global Group - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Piramal Pharma Global Group - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Piramal Pharma Global Group has an exciting opening for a Senior Doctor at our Indore office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Piramal Pharma Global Group:
Piramal Pharma Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in ICD-10

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Piramal Pharma Global Group!
